normalized_question_text: A basketball team has the following heights and weights. What is the height for the 25th percentile? (Final Answer is a value)
normalized_answer_text: \answer{69.5} The height for the 25th percentile is the same as the first quartile. That is 69.5, the median from the lower half of the data

normalized_question_text: The following is a sample of butterfly wingspans measured in millimeters. What wingspan is the 75th percentile? (Final Answer is a value)
normalized_answer_text: \answer{39} The third quartile is the same as the 75th percentile. 39 is the wingspan for the 75th percentile
